beIN SPORTS 7.original_title: Nîmes vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
beIN SPORTS 7.title: نيم vs إيكس - NHL Division 1 - الدوري الفرنسي لكرة اليد
beIN SPORTS 7.desc: انغمس في إثارة كرة اليد الفرنسية مع Liqui Moly Starligue، القسم الأول من LNH سابقًا. تأسس هذا الحدث في الدوري الممتاز عام 1952، ويضم 16 فريقًا من أفضل الفرق يتقاتلون من أجل المجد.
beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Nîmes vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_fr: Le Real Madrid contre le Bayern Munich est déjà le match le plus joué de l'histoire des grandes compétitions européennes.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: أولمبيك مارسيليا vs ميتز - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: سجل مرسيليا 2.4 هدفًا في المباراة الواحدة ضد ميتز على أرضه في الدوري الفرنسي، وهو أعلى معدل له ضد المنافسين الذين استضافوا 15 مرة على الأقل في دوري الدرجة الأولى.
beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne  have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Marseille a marqué 2,4 buts par match contre Metz à domicile en Ligue 1, sa moyenne la plus élevée contre des adversaires accueillis au moins 15 fois dans l'élite.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Paris FC vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 5.title: Paris FC vs موناكو - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 29
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: خسر باريس اثنتين من مبارياته الثلاث على أرضه أمام موناكو في جميع المسابقات، وكانت آخر مباراة له على أرضه أمام ASM هي أكبر هزيمة له على الإطلاق على أرضه في الدوري الفرنسي. لم يخسر باريس إف سي في الدوري الفرنسي منذ أن تولى أنطوان كومبوار المسؤولية، وحصل على تسع نقاط في خمس مباريات، وهو نفس العدد الذي حصل عليه في آخر 12 مباراة تحت قيادة ستيفان جيلي.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Paris FC vs Monaco - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 29ème journée
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Paris FC have lost two of their three home matches against Monaco in all competitions, with their last home game against ASM being their heaviest ever home defeat in Ligue 1. Paris FC are unbeaten in Ligue 1 since Antoine Kombouaré took charge, picking up nine points in five matches, as many as in the last 12 under Stéphane Gilli.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Le Paris FC a perdu deux de ses trois matches à domicile contre Monaco toutes compétitions confondues, son dernier match à domicile contre l'ASM étant sa plus lourde défaite à domicile en Ligue 1. Le Paris FC est invaincu en Ligue 1 depuis l'arrivée d'Antoine Kombouaré, récoltant neuf points en cinq matches, soit autant que lors des 12 derniers sous Stéphane Gilli.

beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Présentant les personnalités qui ont façonné l’ère de la Premier League, dans chaque épisode, nous racontons leur histoire unique qui ne manquera pas d’engager et de divertir tous les fans.

beIN SPORTS 5.title: أبرز أحداث الدوري الإسباني 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: "يقدم هذا البرنامج الذي تبلغ مدته 55 دقيقة أبرز الأحداث التي مدتها 5 دقائق لكل مباراة لعبت أيام الجمعة والسبت والأحد. تتضمن LALIGA عروض فيديو خاصة لأفضل هدف وأفضل تصدي وأفضل لاعب في اليوم."

beIN SPORTS EN 2.title_fr: Rennes vs Angers SCO - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 29ème journée
beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_en: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco  and Lille  picking up more points than SRFC  over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.
beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_fr: Rennes a marqué lors de chacun de ses 27 matchs à domicile contre Angers en Ligue 1, soit le plus grand nombre de matchs à domicile contre le même adversaire pour une équipe tout en marquant à chaque fois dans la division.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: نشرة الأخبار
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: آخر الأخبار من غرفة أخبار beIn SPORTS، ومعاينة ومراجعة التطورات والنتائج بمساهمة من جميع أنحاء العالم من مراسلي beIN.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Dernières nouvelles de la salle d'actualités beIn SPORTS, aperçu et examen des développements et des scores avec la contribution du monde entier des journalistes de beIN.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: مقابلة خاصة - 10/04/26
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: مقابلة خاصة يومية تتعلق بقضية مهمة في اليوم.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: A  daily Special Interview related to an important issue of the day. The interview offers the background and insight into the issue chosen from the world of sport.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Une interview spéciale quotidienne liée à un sujet important de la journée.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: تقرير خاص - 10/04/26
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: "التقرير الخاص" هو تقرير طويل من أحد مراسلي أخبار beIN SPORTS والذي يلقي نظرة بديلة على موضوع من عالم الرياضة.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: "Special Report" is a single long feature from one of beIN SPORTS News reporters that takes an alternative look at a subject from the world of sport.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: "Special Report" est un long reportage unique réalisé par l'un des journalistes de beIN SPORTS News qui porte un regard différent sur un sujet du monde du sport.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: نشرة الأخبار
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: آخر الأخبار من غرفة أخبار beIn SPORTS، ومعاينة ومراجعة التطورات والنتائج بمساهمة من جميع أنحاء العالم من مراسلي beIN.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Dernières nouvelles de la salle d'actualités beIn SPORTS, aperçu et examen des développements et des scores avec la contribution du monde entier des journalistes de beIN.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.original_title: Discover Philadelphia Host City FIFA World Cup 2026
beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: اكتشف مدينة فيلادلفيا المضيفة لكأس العالم لكرة القدم 2026
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: اكتشف فيلادلفيا، التي ستستضيف كأس العالم لكرة القدم 2026، وأبعادها الثقافية والشعبية والمجتمعية لكرة القدم.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.title_fr: Découvrez Philadelphie, ville hôte de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: Discover Philadelphia, which will host the FIFA World Cup 2026, its cultural, grassroots and community dimensions of football.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Découvrez Philadelphie, qui accueillera la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026, ses dimensions culturelles, communautaires et communautaires du football.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: تجارب beIN - الأخبار
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: يختار أحد مراسلي beIN العديدين رياضة ليجربها ويتقنها.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: One of beIN's many  reporters chooses a sport to try and master. In each episode there is a chance to experience the challenges faced in different sports from different parts of the world .
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: L'un des nombreux journalistes de beIN choisit un sport à essayer et à maîtriser.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: كرة القدم الأوروبية
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: جميع آخر الأخبار والمعاينات من عالم الدوريات الأوروبية الخمس الكبرى لكرة القدم.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: All the latest news and previews from the world of the Big Five European Football Leagues. Ahead of the weekend's action, Sports News  provides a preview every Friday of all the latest from the European big leagues.  All the latest from  the Premier League in England, the Bundesliga in Germany, La Liga in Spain, Serie A in Italy, and Ligue 1 in France
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Toutes les dernières actualités et avant-premières du monde des Big Five European Football Leagues.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.title: الحصاد
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc: الحصاد هو استوديو ليلي من beIN Sports News يلقي الضوء على القصص التي تصدرت عناوين الأخبار في عالم الرياضة وتلك القصص التي ستتصدر عناوين الأخبار صباح الغد.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: Al Hassad is a nighltly studio from beIN Sports News that looks at the stories that have made the headlines in the world of sport and those stories that will be making the headlines tomorrow morning.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Al Hassad est un studio nocturne de beIN Sports News qui se penche sur les histoires qui ont fait la une des journaux du monde du sport et celles qui feront la une des journaux demain matin.

beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_en: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
beIN SPORTS NEWS.desc_fr: Dans le monde du sport, peu de débats suscitent autant de passion et d’enthousiasme que ceux autour des plus grands joueurs de football de tous les temps.

beIN 4K.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: برايتون هوف ألبيون vs.ليفربول - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: فاز برايتون في مباراتين من آخر ثلاث مباريات على أرضه في الدوري أمام ليفربول، حيث تغلب عليهم 3-2 في هذه المباراة بالتحديد الموسم الماضي.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Brighton & Hove Albion contre Liverpool - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Brighton a remporté deux de ses trois derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Liverpool, les battant 3-2 lors de ce match précis la saison dernière.

beIN 4K.original_title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN 4K.desc: لم يخسر بورنموث في آخر خمس مباريات في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد مانشستر يونايتد، وسجل أهدافًا في هذه الخمس أكثر مما سجله في أول 12 مباراة ضد الشياطين الحمر في القسم.
beIN 4K.desc_en: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five  than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Bournemouth est invaincu lors de ses cinq derniers matchs de Premier League contre Manchester United, marquant plus de buts lors de ces cinq que lors de ses 12 premiers matchs contre les Red Devils dans la division.

beIN 4K.original_title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
beIN 4K.title: السباق الرئيسي - جائزة اليابان الكبرى للفورمولا 1 - 2026 - بطولة العالم للفورمولا 1 2026
beIN 4K.desc: 24 سباق الجائزة الكبرى من موسم الفورمولا 1 مباشرة وحصريا فقط على beIN.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Course Principale - Grand Prix F1 du Japon - 2026 - Championnat du Monde de Formule 1 FIA 2026
beIN 4K.desc_en:
24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN.
All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.
The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.
For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: 24 Grands Prix de la saison de Formule 1 sont en direct et exclusifs uniquement sur beIN.

beIN 4K.original_title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ارسنال ضد الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN 4K.desc: بعد فوزه في أول ثماني مباريات على أرضه أمام بورنموث في جميع المسابقات، خسر أرسنال هذه المباراة بالضبط في الدوري الموسم الماضي بنتيجة 2-1.
beIN 4K.desc_en: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Après avoir remporté chacun de ses huit premiers matchs à domicile contre Bournemouth toutes compétitions confondues, Arsenal a perdu ce match de championnat 2-1 la saison dernière.

beIN 4K.original_title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد vs سندرلاند - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: لم يحقق نيوكاسل أي فوز في آخر خمس مباريات على أرضه في الدوري ضد سندرلاند، وكان هذا أول لقاء لهم على ملعب سانت جيمس بارك منذ التعادل 1-1 في مارس 2016. ولم يخسر سندرلاند في آخر 10 مباريات في الدوري ضد نيوكاسل، حيث فاز بسبعة من آخر ثماني مباريات.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Sunderland - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Newcastle est sans victoire lors de ses cinq derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Sunderland, avec cette première rencontre de ce type à St James' Park depuis un match nul 1-1 en mars 2016. Sunderland est invaincu lors de ses 10 derniers matches de championnat contre Newcastle, remportant sept des huit derniers.

beIN 4K.original_title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ليفربول vs فولهام - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: لم يحقق ليفربول أي فوز في آخر ثلاث مباريات له في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز أمام فولهام.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Liverpool contre Fulham - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Liverpool est sans victoire lors de ses trois derniers matchs de Premier League contre Fulham.

beIN 4K.original_title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: ارسنال ضد الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN 4K.desc: بعد فوزه في أول ثماني مباريات على أرضه أمام بورنموث في جميع المسابقات، خسر أرسنال هذه المباراة بالضبط في الدوري الموسم الماضي بنتيجة 2-1.
beIN 4K.desc_en: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Après avoir remporté chacun de ses huit premiers matchs à domicile contre Bournemouth toutes compétitions confondues, Arsenal a perdu ce match de championnat 2-1 la saison dernière.

beIN 4K.title_fr: Course Principale - Grand Prix F1 du Japon - 2026 - Championnat du Monde de Formule 1 FIA 2026

24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN.
All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.
The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.
For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

beIN 4K.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: برايتون هوف ألبيون vs.ليفربول - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: فاز برايتون في مباراتين من آخر ثلاث مباريات على أرضه في الدوري أمام ليفربول، حيث تغلب عليهم 3-2 في هذه المباراة بالتحديد الموسم الماضي.
beIN 4K.title_fr: Brighton & Hove Albion contre Liverpool - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_en: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.
beIN 4K.desc_fr: Brighton a remporté deux de ses trois derniers matches de championnat à domicile contre Liverpool, les battant 3-2 lors de ce match précis la saison dernière.

beIN SPORTS 6.original_title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 6.title: أوكسير vs نانت - الدوري الفرنسي 1 2025/2026 الأسبوع 29
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: تلقى أوكسير هدفًا واحدًا على الأقل في كل من آخر 12 مباراة له ضد نانت في جميع المسابقات، منذ فوزه 1-0 في 1 أكتوبر 2006 في الدوري الفرنسي. حصل أوكسير على 11 نقطة في تسع مباريات بالدوري الفرنسي منذ بداية فبراير، أي سبع نقاط أكثر من نانت خلال نفس الفترة وأقل بنقطة واحدة فقط مما حققه في أول 19 مباراة له هذا الموسم.
beIN SPORTS 6.title_fr: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_en: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_fr: Auxerre a encaissé au moins un but lors de chacun de ses 12 derniers matches contre Nantes toutes compétitions confondues, depuis une victoire 1-0 le 1er octobre 2006 en Ligue 1. Auxerre a récolté 11 points en neuf matches de Ligue 1 depuis début février, soit sept points de plus que Nantes sur la même période et seulement un de moins que lors de ses 19 premiers matches de la saison.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: التقى باريس سان جيرمان وليفربول في ست مناسبات سابقة في المنافسات الأوروبية، حيث سجل كلا الفريقين ثلاثة انتصارات لكل منهما.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Le Paris SG et Liverpool se sont déjà rencontrés à six reprises en compétition européenne, les deux équipes enregistrant trois victoires chacune.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Barcelone vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG  have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Barcelone et l'Atlético Madrid se rencontreront pour la cinquième fois en compétition européenne, tous les cinq en quarts de finale de l'UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Le Real Madrid contre le Bayern Munich est déjà le match le plus joué de l'histoire des grandes compétitions européennes.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: سبورتينغ لشبونة vs أرسنال - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: لم يهزم سبورتنج لشبونة أرسنال مطلقًا في سبع محاولات، بما في ذلك الخسارة 5-1 على أرضه في دوري أبطال أوروبا الموسم الماضي.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Le Sporting CP n'a jamais battu Arsenal en sept tentatives, dont une défaite 5-1 à domicile en UEFA Champions League la saison dernière.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: التقى باريس سان جيرمان وليفربول في ست مناسبات سابقة في المنافسات الأوروبية، حيث سجل كلا الفريقين ثلاثة انتصارات لكل منهما.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Le Paris SG et Liverpool se sont déjà rencontrés à six reprises en compétition européenne, les deux équipes enregistrant trois victoires chacune.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Barcelone vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_en: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG  have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_fr: Barcelone et l'Atlético Madrid se rencontreront pour la cinquième fois en compétition européenne, tous les cinq en quarts de finale de l'UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS.desc_en: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: La meilleure compétition masculine de volley-ball en France, la LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), propose une saison de clubs d'élite s'affrontant dans une ligue aller-retour avant les séries éliminatoires.

beIN SPORTS.desc_en: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.
beIN SPORTS.desc_fr: La Ligue Qatarienne est la ligue officielle de football du Qatar.
